title: delissea subcordata subsp. obtusifolia
intro: Delissea subcordata subsp. obtusifolia, also known as the Ma'o hau hele, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to Hawaii. This plant is used in traditional Hawaiian medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Delissea subcordata subsp. obtusifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or salves, which can be applied topically or ingested under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
